handoff_metadata.handoff_notes: Enhanced v2.0 build with full SLDS compliance and responsive design patterns

steps.design_notes: Warm, brand-aligned greeting with clear order tracking CTA
steps.accessibility_notes: High contrast welcome message with clear focus states

utterances.agent: Hi there! I'm here to help you track your Wolverine order. What can I help you find today?
utterances.user: I need to check my order status

web.agent: Welcome to Wolverine Order Tracking! I can help you find information about your recent order.
web.user: I want to track my order

sms.agent: Hi! Reply with your order number to track your package.

email.subject: Your Wolverine Order Tracking Assistant
email.body:
Hi, I placed an order a few days ago and haven't seen an update. Can you tell me where it is?

Thanks,
Jane Smith

steps.design_notes: Agent reply — sender email confirms identity, no verification step needed. Single reply resolves order lookup, status, and tracking in one message.
steps.accessibility_notes: Clear status communication with tracking number prominent

utterances.agent: Hi Jane! I found your order WW-2024-789456 for Wolverine Work Boots. It's in transit and arriving March 25th. Track it here: 1Z999AA1234567890. Let me know if you need anything else!

web.agent: Here's your current order status and tracking information:

sms.agent: Hi Jane! Order WW-2024-789456: In Transit, arriving Mar 25. Track: 1Z999AA1234567890. Need anything else?

email.subject: Re: Your Wolverine Order Tracking Assistant
email.body:
Hi Jane,

We found your order WW-2024-789456 for Wolverine Work Boots ($149.99). It's currently in transit and expected to arrive by March 25th.

Tracking number: 1Z999AA1234567890

Reply to this email if you have any other questions — happy to help!

Wolverine Support

thread_reply.body:
Hi, I placed an order a few days ago and haven't seen an update. Can you tell me where it is?

Thanks,
Jane Smith

steps.design_notes: Helpful error state with alternative search options
steps.accessibility_notes: Clear error messaging with alternative action paths

utterances.agent: I couldn't find an order with that information. Let me help you try a different way.
utterances.user: Let me try my email address instead

web.agent: We couldn't locate that order. Would you like to try with your email address?
web.user: Yes, let me try my email

sms.agent: Order not found. Try email address or call 1-800-WOLVERINE for help.

email.subject: Re: Your Wolverine Order Tracking Assistant
email.body:
Hi Jane,

We weren't able to locate an order tied to this email address. Could you reply with your order number (format: WW-YYYY-######)? You can find it in your original confirmation email.

If you need immediate help, our team is also available at 1-800-WOLVERINE.

Wolverine Support

thread_reply.body:
Hi, I placed an order a few days ago and haven't seen an update. Can you tell me where it is?

Thanks,
Jane Smith

steps.design_notes: Clear explanation of partial fulfillment with remaining item timeline
steps.accessibility_notes: Detailed shipment breakdown accessible to all users

utterances.agent: Your order shipped in multiple packages. Package 1 of 2 is in transit, package 2 will ship tomorrow.
utterances.user: Got it, when will the second package arrive?

web.agent: This order has multiple shipments. Here's the breakdown:
web.user: When will I get the remaining items?

sms.agent: Multiple packages: Package 1 in transit, Package 2 ships tomorrow. Both arrive by Mar 27.

email.subject: Re: Your Wolverine Order Tracking Assistant
email.body:
Hi Jane,

Your order WW-2024-789456 is shipping in multiple packages:

• Package 1 of 2 — In Transit, arriving March 25th (tracking: 1Z999AA1234567890)
• Package 2 of 2 — Ships tomorrow, arriving March 27th (tracking: 1Z999AA9876543210)

Both packages will arrive by March 27th. Reply if you have any questions!

Wolverine Support

thread_reply.body:
Hi, I placed an order a few days ago and haven't seen an update. Can you tell me where it is?

Thanks,
Jane Smith

steps.design_notes: Empathetic greeting acknowledging the product issue
steps.accessibility_notes: Supportive tone accessible across all interaction methods

utterances.agent: I'm sorry to hear you're having an issue with your Wolverine product. I'm here to help make this right.
utterances.user: My boots are falling apart after just two weeks

web.agent: We're sorry you're experiencing issues with your Wolverine product. Let's get this resolved quickly.
web.user: I need to return these defective boots

email.subject: Product Return Assistance - We're Here to Help
email.body: Thank you for contacting Wolverine support. We sincerely apologize for any product quality issues and want to make this right immediately.

sms.agent: Sorry to hear about your product issue. Reply to describe what happened and we'll make it right.
sms.user: My boots are falling apart after two weeks

steps.design_notes: Structured form to capture issue details with photo upload capability
steps.accessibility_notes: Form fields with clear labels and optional image upload with alt text

utterances.agent: Can you describe what's happening with the boots? Photos would be helpful if you have them.
utterances.user: The sole is separating from the upper after minimal wear

web.agent: Please describe the issue and upload photos if possible:
web.user: The sole is coming apart and there's stitching failure

email.subject: Re: Product Issue Details Needed
email.body: Please describe the specific problem you're experiencing and attach any photos of the defect. This will help us process your return quickly.

sms.agent: What's happening with the boots? Describe the problem and we'll get a return started.
sms.user: Sole is separating from the upper after minimal wear
